text: Bonneville Academy Fall Festival is Friday, October 24, 3:30-6:00 pm on the front lawn. Sixth graders are hosting the pumpkin bowling booth. Please sign up for a volunteer shift on the front-office clipboard by October 17.

Fall parent-teacher conferences are November 13 and 14. Sign-ups open through the front office. Ms. Rivera will host families in Room 201; other 6th grade teachers will be in their usual rooms. Guardians will receive a confirmation email once you book.
Winter break begins after early dismissal on Friday, December 19. Classes resume Monday, January 5. Progress reports will be sent home in the take-home folder on December 18. Have a restful break!

Third grade winter break reading challenge: read four books over break and log them on the take-home reading tracker. Everyone who returns a completed tracker on January 5 gets a small prize from the treasure box.

Welcome back! Bonneville Academy Winter Book Fair runs Tuesday-Friday, January 27-30, in the library. Sixth graders may shop Wednesday during flex block. Guardian volunteers can sign up through the front office.
Third graders will visit the Winter Book Fair on Thursday, January 29. If your student would like to shop, please send them with a labeled envelope. All titles are grade-appropriate.
Spring break is Monday-Friday, March 16-20. Classes resume Monday, March 23. The 6th grade Egypt research paper is due Friday, February 27, well before the break, so please pace accordingly.

Sixth grade Life Science field trip to Loveland Living Planet Aquarium on Thursday, February 12. Permission slips went home last Friday and are due Monday. Chaperone spots are still open — please reply to Ms. Thurman if interested.

Reminder: Volcano and Plate Tectonics presentations run March 3-6 in class. Please bring your model on your assigned day. Baking-soda eruptions must be tested at home first — check the safety notes in the project packet.
Fractions and Decimals Unit Assessment is Friday, November 7. Study block Thursday during flex period. Bring the review packet with attempted problems for extra credit.
Great work on the ratios warm-ups this week! The Ratios and Proportions Problem Set is due Friday, January 30. Come to office hours Tuesday if you want to work through problems 12-15 together.
Wonder Novel Study essay is due Friday, November 14. Turn in through Google Classroom or hand in a printed copy. Rubric is in Materials — quotations must be cited with page numbers.

Ancient Egypt research paper is due Friday, February 27. Please share your Google Doc with me by Friday, February 20, so I can leave draft comments. Do not use general web search AI to write for you — cite your sources.
Chapter book reports on Charlotte's Web are due Friday, November 14. Please read a little each night to stay on the reading schedule. Neat handwriting counts on the final packet!
Multiplication Tables Mastery Quiz (0-10) is Friday, November 7. Please practice for ten minutes a night with the flashcards sent home. Xtra Math login is also in your student folder.

Third grade field trip to Hogle Zoo on Wednesday, February 25. Permission slips went home Monday. Please pack a labeled sack lunch and a water bottle. Chaperone spots are limited — reply to Ms. Lundquist by Friday, February 6.
Habitat dioramas are due Friday, November 21. Bring your shoebox and materials to class no later than Thursday afternoon. Presentations will run for the last twenty minutes of each class next week.

Third grade Winter Concert is Thursday, December 18, at 6:30 pm in the multipurpose room. Wear a white top and dark pants or skirt. Recorders and music folders needed for the recorder feature during Jingle Bells.

Charcoal self-portraits are due Friday, December 12. Please pick up your fixative-sprayed piece from Studio 2 on Thursday if you need to work on it at home. Rubric and value scale reference are in Materials.
Third grade watercolor landscapes are due Friday, February 20. Please label the back with your student's name and homeroom. Finished paintings will be displayed at the spring art show on March 12.
